---
title: "Instructor Only: Time Trends And Small Multiples Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
flu <- read_csv("data/real/flu_vaccination_age_time_clean.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

selected_age_groups <- flu |>
  filter(
    month == 5,
    age_group %in% c("6 Months - 4 Years", "18-49 Years", "50-64 Years", ">=65 Years"),
    !is.na(estimate)
  )

ggplot(selected_age_groups, aes(x = season_start_year, y = estimate)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue") +
  facet_wrap(vars(age_group)) +
  labs(
    title = "Flu Vaccination Estimates Over Time",
    x = "Season start year",
    y = "Estimate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
